properties.title: US ambassador: EU must honor its trade deal with Trump
properties.description: Andrew Puzder is the ambassador of the United States to the European Union . BRUSSELS — U.S. President Donald Trump recently announced that he would reimpose higher tariffs on EU-made automobiles and trucks from 15 percent to 25 percent. properties.title: US, China and Russia prefer a divided Europe, Kallas warns

Bolton spart nicht mit deutlichen Worten in Richtung Washington.
